message:
chore: regenerate Cargo.lock for frankenterm-core-caut-types (ft-2z15d follow-up)

Lockfile drift left over from the ft-2z15d caut-types extraction. 12
leaf-boundary tests under frankenterm-core-caut-types::tests pass
(linter-added under ft-cui2w post-extraction; no extra regression test
needed from me).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3426,6 +3426,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "frankenterm-alloc",
  "frankenterm-core-ars",
  "frankenterm-core-cass-types",
+ "frankenterm-core-caut-types",
  "frankenterm-core-config-types",
  "frankenterm-core-error-types",
  "frankenterm-core-fleet",
@@ -3508,18 +3509,29 @@ dependencies = [
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "frankenterm-core-caut-types"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+ "thiserror 2.0.18",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "frankenterm-core-config-types"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
+ "toml 0.8.23",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "frankenterm-core-error-types"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
+ "serde_json",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
